NAME: ICD_CODE_113 
LONG NAME: ICD_CODE_113 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
3 
SOURCE: 
Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) National Death Index (NDI) 
VALUES: 
001 = Salmonella infections (A01–A02) 
002 = Shigellosis and amebiasis (A03, 
A06) 
003 = Certain other intestinal infections 
(A04, A07–A09) 
004 = Tuberculosis (A16–A19) 
005 = Respiratory tuberculosis (A16) 
006 = Other tuberculosis (A17–A19) 
007 = Whooping cough (A37) 
008 = Scarlet fever and erysipelas (A38, 
A46)
